home.eyebrow: Identity, permissions, and sessions in one place
home.title: One account for every Trash app.
home.description: Create a profile once, connect apps with clear permissions, and keep every session under control from a single clean dashboard.
home.features_description: Trash gives users a polished account layer while apps get simple authorization, profile access, and session management.

profile.label: Unified profile
profile.description: The same identity follows users across every connected app.

apps.label: Connected apps
apps.description: Each app requests access only when it needs account data.

permissions.label: Permission prompts
permissions.description: Readable scopes show what will be shared before consent.

sessions.label: Session controls
sessions.description: Users can review and revoke access from settings.

preview.title: Share only what is needed
preview.description: Review exactly what an app can access before you continue.

permissions.account: Username and email for account linking.
permissions.profile: Profile details only after explicit approval.

profile.title: A profile users understand
profile.description: Names, avatars, and profile details are managed once and reused consistently.

permissions.title: Consent that feels obvious
permissions.description: Every app connection shows readable scopes before data is shared.

sessions.title: Session control built in
sessions.description: Users can review active sessions and revoke access when something looks wrong.

connections.title: Connections stay visible
connections.description: Every app relationship is listed so users understand what is connected.

home.data_title: The account layer apps can rely on.
home.data_description: Trash keeps the important identity, security, and authorization data organized in one consistent place.
home.flow_title: A simple path from signup to connected apps.
home.flow_description: The landing story now matches the product flow: account, profile, authorization, and ongoing control.

create.title: Create an account
create.description: Users sign up once and complete the profile connected apps will recognize.

review.title: Review app access
review.description: Authorization screens explain the app, callback, and requested permissions.

control.title: Control everything later
control.description: Settings keep account details, profile data, sessions, and connections available.

cta.title: Start with a clean account foundation.
cta.description: Create your Trash account, set up your profile, and connect apps with permission prompts that make sense.
